(Screenshot Analysis)  
The LibreOffice Impress application is open with a presentation titled "Dickinson_Slides.pptx." The presenter notes are visible on the bottom right-hand side. The sidebar on the left shows a list of slides, and there are various menu buttons at the top.  

The current task is to extract all the presenter notes from this presentation and save them in a Word document titled `notes.docx`, placing it on the desktop.

(Next Action)  
Identify how to extract or copy presenter notes efficiently. The best strategy here is to explore if there is a feature in LibreOffice Impress allowing us to export or copy all presenter notes. If not, manually copying the notes will be required.

(Grounded Action)  
Open the "File" menu to explore the possibility of exporting presenter notes.  
```python
agent.click("The 'File' menu at the top left corner of the LibreOffice Impress window", 1, "left")
```
